title: Concordance Engine Packet Schema (v1.0 — engine-aligned)
description: Describes the packet shape the engine actually validates. The original long-form schema (packet_type, provenance, claims with claim_id/kind, constraints, hash) is preserved at packet.schema.aspirational.json as a forward design target; it is not the contract the CLI runs against. Update this file when domain validators add new fields.

domain.description: Routes the packet to a domain validator. Unknown domains pass with a 'no validator registered' note.

id.description: Optional packet identifier. Not enforced by the engine.

created_epoch.description: Unix epoch seconds when the packet was created. Required for the GOD gate; missing or zero quarantines.

required_witnesses.description: BROTHERS-gate threshold. 0 disables the witness check.

witness_count.description: Affirming witnesses present at evaluation time.

text.description: Plain-text decision description. Used by the governance/business/household/education/church validators.

description.description: Alias for 'text' accepted by the governance validator.

claims.description: Fallback claims list used when domain-specific RED/FLOOR blocks are absent. Items may be strings or {subject, predicate} dicts.

artifacts.description: Fallback artifacts map used when domain-specific FLOOR blocks are absent.

diagnostics.description: Diagnostic chain entries consumed by domain validators (chemistry, CS, statistics).

MATH_VERIFY.description: Computational verification artifacts for mathematics. Recognized fields: expr_a/expr_b/variables (symbolic equality); function/variable/claimed_derivative; integrand/variable/claimed_antiderivative; function/variable/point/claimed_limit; equation/variable/claimed_solutions.

PHYS_VERIFY.description: Computational verification artifacts for physics. Recognized fields: equation/symbols (dimensional consistency); before/after/tolerance_relative/tolerance_absolute (conservation arithmetic).

units.description: Unit system declaration (e.g. 'SI'). Satisfies physics FLOOR.

CHEM_VERIFY.description: Computational verification artifacts for chemistry. Recognized fields: equation (atom/charge balance); temperature_K (positive absolute temperature).

BIO_VERIFY.description: Computational verification artifacts for biology. Recognized fields: n_replicates / min_replicates; assay_classes / min_assay_classes; dose_response (doses, responses, expected_direction); power_analysis (effect_size, alpha, n_per_group, target_power).

CS_VERIFY.description: Computational verification artifacts for computer science. Recognized fields: code (Python source); function_name; test_cases; input_generator; claimed_class; sizes; tolerance.

STAT_VERIFY.description: Computational verification artifacts for statistics. Recognized fields: test (two_sample_t/one_sample_t/z/chi2/f); test inputs (n, mean, sd, df, statistic); claimed_p; raw_p_values/method/claimed_rejected_indices; estimate/ci_low/ci_high.

DECISION_PACKET.description: Structured governance / business / household / education / church decision packet. Verifier checks structural completeness (title, scope, red_items, floor_items, way_path, execution_steps, witnesses) and witness_count consistency. Content judgement remains human.
